parameters.name: Torque Limiter
parameters.description: Limits engine torque based on RPM and atmospheric pressure. Output in mg/stroke.

parameters.name: Smoke Limiter
parameters.description: Limits injected quantity based on RPM and inlet air mass to prevent excessive smoke. Output in mg/stroke.

parameters.name: Boost Target Map
parameters.description: Desired turbo boost pressure at given RPM and injection quantity. Output in mbar.

parameters.name: N75 Duty Cycle
parameters.description: Controls the N75 solenoid (VNT vane position) at given RPM and injection quantity.

parameters.name: Boost Pressure Limiter
parameters.description: Maximum allowed boost pressure based on RPM and atmospheric pressure. Output in mbar.

parameters.name: SVBL - Absolute Boost Limit
parameters.description: Single value absolute maximum boost pressure ceiling. Output in mbar.

parameters.name: EGR Map
parameters.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation valve duty cycle map.

parameters.name: MAF Sensor Linearization
parameters.description: Linearization curve for the mass airflow sensor.

parameters.name: MAF Correction by Temperature
parameters.description: Correction factor for MAF readings based on intake air temperature.
